planner_rules: Preserve canon continuity for identity, wardrobe, and setting while exploring broad story options.
Do not silently downgrade risky ideas into a safer lane. Surface lane-sensitive beats explicitly for later review.
Keep the planner focused on episode structure and continuity, not final render prompt wording.
Keep every beat suitable for a general audience.
Use mystery, implication, emotional stakes, and public-risk tension instead of erotic escalation.
Avoid sexualized body focus, nudity, or fetish-coded scene goals.
Treat all beats as adult-only material while preserving canon identity and location continuity.
Keep consent, role clarity, and escalation logic explicit inside the plan.
Flag beats that need narrower downstream compliance handling rather than improvising around them.
